name: The AI-Enhanced Human
description: Using LLMs and agents for research and personal admin. Identifying which cognitive tasks to delegate to machine intelligence and which to retain for human oversight.

name: Consumer Intelligence
description: Analysis of products/services worth the investment (and which aren't). Decoding market behavior to decide which products or services actually deliver on their value proposition.

name: Decision Engineering
description: Refining "Frameworks" into a proactive discipline. The discipline of refining the process of choice itself.

name: Case Studies
description: Forensic breakdowns of real-world wins and failures. Analyzing past wins and failures to identify repeatable patterns for your own strategy.

name: Acquisition Strategy
description: Market timing, location arbitrage, and hidden cost audits.

name: Real Assets & Living
description: Strategic deployment of capital and resources into physical environments.

name: Alternative Shelter
description: Short-term rentals, co-living, and nomadic living models. Evaluating non-traditional housing and land models for portability, cost-efficiency, or lifestyle flexibility.

name: Value Engineering:
description: Renovation ROI, densification (ADUs), and equity-building upgrades. Analyzing where to cut costs and where to over-invest to maximize the ROI of a physical property.

name: Personal Systems & AI
description: Optimizing the individual’s operational capacity through technology.

name: Tech Stack
description: Reviews of tools that actually move the needle on productivity. Selecting the leanest, most effective software and hardware configuration to support your specific goals.

name: Time Arbitrage
description: Strategies for "buying back" time via outsourcing or automation. Deciding where to buy back time and how to reallocate it toward higher-leverage activities.

name: Workflow Design
description: Automating the mundane to free up cognitive bandwidth. Choosing the sequence of operations that minimizes friction and maximizes daily output.

name: Market Intelligence
description: Navigating external economic forces to find competitive advantages.

name: Macro Shifts
description: How interest rates, demographics, and tech impact the individual. Evaluating how large-scale economic trends should alter your long-term financial positioning.

name: Opportunity Spotting
description: Identifying undervalued markets or emerging lifestyle trends. Distinguishing between fleeting hype and undervalued entry points in emerging markets.

name: The Command Center (Interactive)
description: Practical tools for stress-testing decisions in real-time.

name: Strategic Playbooks
description: Step-by-step "Decision Trees" for major life milestones. Selecting a pre-vetted sequence of actions for specific high-stakes life transitions.

name: Capital Allocation
description: ROI-driven logic for where to put the next $1,000 or $100,000. Deciding the optimal distribution of liquid and illiquid wealth across your entire portfolio.

name: Mental Models
description: The "how-to" of thinking (Inversion, Second-order effects). Selecting the right cognitive framework to strip away bias and see a problem for what it actually is.

name: Trade-off Analysis
description: Evaluating Lifestyle vs. Financial gains. Calculating exactly what you are giving up for every choice you make to ensure the price is worth paying.

name: System Optimization
description: Smart infrastructure, energy independence, and preventive maintenance. Deciding which mechanical or structural upgrades maximize utility while minimizing long-term maintenance costs.

name: Risk & Resilience
description: Identifying "single points of failure" in life and money. Determining your "ruin point" and building buffers to survive high-impact, low-probability events.

name: Calculators & Models
description: Dynamic tools for Buy vs. Rent, Renovation ROI, and Net Worth forecasting. Quantifying the "what-if" scenarios to move from gut feelings to hard data.
